name: Astra Removals — Lead to Social Proof + Magna Upsell

nodes.name: 01 — MoveScan Lead Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from MoveScan when homeowner completes survey. Payload: customer_name, email, phone, origin_postcode, dest_postcode, move_date, bedrooms, survey_id

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Immediately returns 200 so MoveScan doesn't time out. Processing continues asynchronously.

nodes.name: 02 — Extract & Format Lead Data
nodes.notes: Maps raw webhook payload to clean named variables for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: 03 — Dorset / BH Postcode Check
nodes.notes: Checks if origin OR destination postcode starts with BH, DT, or SP — Magna Park catchment area. True branch sets magnaCTA flag.

nodes.name: 03a — Magna Upsell Flag ON
nodes.notes: Sets magnaCTA = true. Downstream Claude prompt will include storage upsell paragraph.

nodes.name: 03b — Standard Post Only
nodes.notes: Sets magnaCTA = false. Standard Astra social proof post with no storage mention.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 800,
  "system": "You are a warm, professional social media manager for Astra Removals, a trusted local removals company based in Bournemouth, Dorset. You write authentic, local, friendly content that builds trust. Never mention customer surnames or specific addresses. Keep posts positive, human, and genuine.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Generate social media posts for a recently completed removal job.

Move details:
- Origin area: {{ $json.originArea }} postcode area
- Destination: {{ $json.destArea }} postcode area
- Home size: {{ $json.volumeCategory }} ({{ $json.volumeCategory === 'small' ? '1-2 bed' : $json.volumeCategory === 'medium' ? '3-4 bed' : '5+ bed' }})
- Move date: {{ $json.moveDateFormatted }}

{{ $json.magnaCTA ? 'IMPORTANT: Include a natural, non-pushy mention of Magna Park Self Storage (magnaparkselfstore.co.uk) for customers who need temporary storage during a move or between properties. This should feel like a helpful tip, not an advert.' : '' }}

Requirements:
- Facebook post: 60-100 words, warm and local, include relevant emoji, end with a soft CTA (e.g. "Get your free quote today")
- Instagram caption: 40-70 words, slightly punchier, 3-5 relevant hashtags including #AstraRemovals #DorsetRemovals
- Do NOT use the customer's name
- Sound like a real local business, not corporate

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format (no markdown, no extra text):
{"fb_post": "...", "ig_post": "...", "confidence": 0.0}"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: 04 — Claude: Generate Social Post
nodes.notes: Calls Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 with structured prompt. Returns JSON with fb_post, ig_post, and confidence score. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: Parse Claude Response
nodes.notes: Extracts fb_post, ig_post, and confidence score from Claude's JSON response.

nodes.name: 05 — Confidence Score Gate
nodes.notes: Routes based on Claude's self-scored confidence. >= 0.75 = auto-publish. < 0.75 = Slack review required.

nodes.name: Slack: Human Review Required
nodes.notes: Sends post draft to Slack #social-review channel with approve/reject buttons. Requires Slack bot token in credentials.

nodes.name: 06 — Smart Scheduler (Optimal Time)
nodes.notes: Waits until optimal publishing time. Tue-Thu 7:30pm for weekday leads. Saturday 10am for weekend leads. Uses luxon DateTime with Europe/London timezone.

nodes.name: 07a — Publish to Facebook
nodes.notes: Posts to Astra Removals Facebook page via Graph API. Set FB_PAGE_ID_ASTRA and FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN_ASTRA as n8n environment variables.

nodes.name: 07b — Create IG Media Container
nodes.notes: Step 1 of 2-step Instagram publish. Creates media container. Requires a default branded image URL (ASTRA_DEFAULT_IMAGE_URL env var). Set IG_ACCOUNT_ID_ASTRA and IG_ACCESS_TOKEN_ASTRA.

nodes.name: Wait 30s (IG Processing)
nodes.notes: Instagram requires a brief wait after container creation before publishing.

nodes.name: 07c — Publish IG Post
nodes.notes: Step 2: publishes the IG media container. Returns ig_media_id for logging.

nodes.name: 08a — Wait Until 48h Post-Move
nodes.notes: Waits until 48 hours after the customer's move date before sending review request SMS. If move date already past, fires immediately.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: =Hi {{ $json.customerName.split(' ')[0] }}, thank you for choosing Astra Removals! We hope your move went smoothly. We'd love a quick Google review if you have 2 minutes — it means the world to a local business: https://g.page/r/AstraRemovals/review Thanks so much 🙂 — The Astra Team

nodes.name: 08b — Send Google Review SMS
nodes.notes: Sends SMS via Twilio 48hrs post-move. Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER as env vars. Update Google review link with real Astra Place ID.

nodes.name: 09 — Log Run to Astra CRM
nodes.notes: Logs every workflow run to Airtable Astra CRM. Set AIRTABLE_BASE_ID_ASTRA env var. Create 'Social Automation Runs' table with matching field names.

_readme.workflow_name: Astra Removals — Lead to Social Proof + Magna Upsell
_readme.created_for: Ricky — Astra Removals / Magna Park / MoveScan ecosystem
required_credentials: Slack Bot Token (httpHeaderAuth) — optional, for review workflow
required_env_vars: FB_PAGE_ID_ASTRA — Your Astra Removals Facebook Page ID
AIRTABLE_BASE_ID_ASTRA — Airtable base ID for Astra CRM
ASTRA_DEFAULT_IMAGE_URL — Public URL of default branded image for IG posts
MOVESCAN_SECRET — Webhook auth token shared with MoveScan
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Settings > Import Workflow)
2. Set all environment variables in n8n Settings > Environment Variables
3. Create credentials for Anthropic, Twilio, Airtable
4. Create 'Social Automation Runs' table in your Airtable base
6. Add MOVESCAN_SECRET to webhook header auth
7. Test with a manual webhook trigger using sample payload
